issues.title: Structure Timeline: introduce RowShell and migrate Beat–Scene rows
issues.body:
## Intent
Einführung von `StructureTimelineRowShell` (Label-Slot + Content-Slot pro Zeile) und Migration der Structure-Tracks Beat, Act, Sequence, Scene.

## User Journey
1. User öffnet Structure Timeline in Tauri.
2. User scrollt vertikal — Beat-Label und Beat-Lane bleiben als eine Zeile gekoppelt.
3. User scrollt horizontal — Labels bleiben fix, Lanes bewegen sich.

## Problem
Zwei parallele Listen (Labels links, Lanes rechts) erfordern manuelle Höhen-/Reihenfolge-Sync (Slice 1 nur Patches).

## Solution
- Neu: `src/components/structure/timeline/StructureTimelineRowShell.tsx`
- Migrate Beat/Act/Seq/Scene in `StructureTimelineEditor.tsx`
- Behalte einen `scrollRef` für Playhead

## Runtime
| Axis | This slice |
|------|------------|
| Local (desktop) | yes |
| Cloud session | no |
| Appwrite Functions | skip |

## Edge Cases
- Book vs audio vs film strategy flags — nur Structure-Rows, keine Film-Zeilen in diesem Slice
- Resize track heights — RowShell prop `heightPx`

## Acceptance
- [ ] Jede Structure-Zeile ist ein DOM-Paar `[label | content]`
- [ ] Vertikal ein Row-Stack; horizontal ein gemeinsamer scrollRef
- [ ] Labels horizontal fix
- [ ] Playwright Beat/Akt alignment Δ ≤ 2px
- [ ] Marquee/trim Beat/Act regression grün

## Design
Epic: `.qa/design/timeline-row-pair-layout.md`

## Runner
Feature slug: `timeline-row-shell-structure`

issues.title: Structure Timeline: migrate audio lanes to row-pair shell
dependsOn: Structure Timeline: introduce RowShell and migrate Beat–Scene rows
issues.body:
## Intent
Audio-Section und jede DAW-Lane als Row-Pair statt getrennte Label-/Scroll-Listen.

## User Journey
1. User sieht Dialog-Mixer links und Clip-Lane rechts in einer Zeile.
2. Vertikales Scrollen koppelt Sidebar und Lane.

## Problem
`StructureTimelineAudioLaneLabels` und `ScrollRows` sind weiterhin zwei Listen.

## Solution
- Per-lane rows via RowShell
- Reuse `StructureTimelineAudioSectionChrome`
- Refactor `StructureTimelineAudioLanes.tsx`

## Runtime
| Axis | This slice |
|------|------------|
| Local (desktop) | yes |
| Cloud session | no |
| Appwrite Functions | skip |

## Acceptance
- [ ] Audio header/footer als Row-Pair-Zeilen
- [ ] Jede Lane: sidebar + content in einer Zeile
- [ ] Dialog lane Δ ≤ 2px in Playwright
- [ ] Expanded 280/320px heights sync

## Design
Epic: `.qa/design/timeline-row-pair-layout.md`

## Blockers
Depends on RowShell structure slice

## Runner
Feature slug: `timeline-row-shell-audio`

issues.title: Structure Timeline: film rows in RowShell; remove parallel label column
dependsOn: Structure Timeline: migrate audio lanes to row-pair shell
issues.body:
## Intent
Film-Zeilen (Shot/Clip/Musik/SFX) in RowShell; parallele Label-Spalte entfernen; Editor shrink (T50).

## User Journey
1. Film-Projekt: Shot → Audio → Clip → Musik → SFX visuell korrekt untereinander.
2. Kein dauerhafter Versatz zwischen Label- und Content-Spalte.

## Problem
Film-Reihenfolge war in Slice 1 gefixt, Architektur-Risiko bleibt.

## Solution
- Migrate `StructureTimelineFilmProductionTracks` into row stack
- Remove legacy left label column from editor
- Update `docs/STRUCTURE_TIMELINE.md`

## Runtime
| Axis | This slice |
|------|------------|
| Local (desktop) | yes |
| Cloud session | no |
| Appwrite Functions | skip |

## Acceptance
- [ ] Film row order korrekt im Row-Stack
- [ ] Keine parallele Label-Spalte
- [ ] Tauri `#qa-timeline-row-alignment-tauri` PASS
- [ ] docs/STRUCTURE_TIMELINE.md Layout-Abschnitt

## Design
Epic: `.qa/design/timeline-row-pair-layout.md`

## Blockers
Depends on audio row-pair slice

## Runner
Feature slug: `timeline-row-shell-film`
